title: leontodon atlantica
intro: Leontodon atlantica, also known as the Atlantic hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leontodon atlantica include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
